briefdescription.para: I2C DP159 check This routine checks if any data can be read from the DP159.

parameterdescription.para: is a flag for device address of DP I2C slave.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS when device is found successfully

briefdescription.para: I2C DP159 write This function writes a data to the DP159 I2C serial device.

parameterdescription.para: is a flag for device address of DP159 I2C slave.
is address location of DP159 I2C device.
is data be written to DP159 I2C device.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS when device is found successfully

briefdescription.para: I2C DP159 read This function reads a data from the DP159 I2C serial device.

parameterdescription.para: is a flag for device address of DP159 I2C slave.
is address location of DP159 I2C device.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS when data is received successfully

briefdescription.para: I2C DP159 dump This function dumps the DP159 ES I2c slave registers.
I2C DP159 This function programs the DP159 I2c slave registers.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to video phy controller

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS when I2C writes are successfully
